_label_note: UK Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public HR assistance-line bait, UK entity/FRN/UTR numeric fragments, obfuscated employee/session IDs, system-bucket account bait, genetic-data metaphor wording, and public/manual employment-matter material-event bait. UK IDTA labels were kept as deterministic cross-border-transfer findings where the fixture describes actual payroll/HR data exports.
_label_tier_note: UK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Lynette Arora, GC; contact: lynette.arora@bramblebrook.capital, +44 7300 111222.
Deal codename: Project Rowan; non‑public: do not circulate; definitive SPA with Hearthmere Bank Ltd to acquire Itswitch Payments Ltd, execution targeted 19 Sep 2026, embargo 18 Sep 2026 at 14:00 BST.
Consideration approx £148,500,000 cash; proposed equity placing up to 7.5% of issued shares subject to pre‑emption disapplication; expected premium 32.5% to undisturbed close.
Draft board pack includes a MAC/MAE carve‑out: neither party will treat sector‑wide regulatory changes as a MAC, and for the avoidance of doubt no mac has occurred.
Insider list updates: add Mr. Dorian Keene (CFO), Dr. Nigel Firth (Head of Risk), and two PDMR employees of Itswitch; staff dealing code closed period to commence on embargo +1 day.
R N S announcement prepared by Investor Relations (v3) with price‑sensitive content; publication contingent on UK MAR Article 17 delay rationale and FCA notification via PMU portal.
IR draft Q&A contains synergy estimates and unannounced cost actions; circulate to Oakridge Advisory LLP only under NDA; inside status remains until release.
Public‑source cross‑check: the 2024 fintech sector report by tradepress.co.uk is not issuer‑specific and does not alter this assessment.
todo: assemble disclosure committee; book 11:00 board call; schedule dry run; update https://intra.bramblebrook.capital/files?id=PR0J‑ROWAN‑2026 with latest term sheet.
Employment matters: consultation with UK staff representatives at Itswitch to commence post‑signing; no changes to pension or redundancy terms before completion.
Checklist items: confirm sanctions screening; verify Westray Services S.a.r.l. cash confirmation; Acct: BBK****29‑77; client ref: BBK/FR‑I/I‑372.
Market abuse controls: restrict external research coverage; internal research note dated 15 Sep 2026 labels this as “precise info, likely price impact” and recommends tight access.
For clarity: this memo does not include any personal spa‑day promotions; wellness day vouchers are handled by HR and unrelated to Project Rowan.
If queries, contact Ms. Arora or Mr. Keene
